rulings.Case Title: CAROL BLUMENFELD SACHAL VS. JUAN DE DIOS RODRIGUEZ-PINA BLANCO et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Hearing Set By The Court
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, February 6, 2014, line 1. PLAINTIFF's Motion for Appointment of Plaintiff as Referee DENIED. CCP 873.050. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DIANA PENG et al VS. RICHARD PATRICK GORDON et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Moiton To Exempt An Award Of Damamges Or Settlement From Judgment Creditor'S Claim
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, February 6, 2014, line 2. PLAINTIFF DIANA PENG, ALAN LEDESMA and RAY ABASOLO's Motion To Exempt An Award Of Damamges Or Settlement From Judgment Creditor's Claim DENIED without prejudice as follows: (1) motion is premature; (2) moving party has not waived his right to claim exemption; (3) moving party shall re-file the motion, if appropriate, if and when the amount of recovery is known; (4) moving party shall supply current financial statement. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PERSONALITY HOTELS, LLC VS. YUNG TRAN et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, February 6, 2014, line 3. DEFENDANT YUNG TRAN and YOUNGJOON SONG's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT/ADJUDICATION DENIED. Traible issue of fact as to Frank Lembi's authority to execute assignment on behalf of Plaintiff, e.g. (1) assignment is signed by Frank Lembi, member (Ex. To Tran Declaration); (2) 25% ownership interest in Plaintiff and 50% interest in Personality Hotels Manager, LLC were held by bankruptcy trustee. 11 USCA 541(a)(1) and Ex. O to Goldstein Reply Declaration. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BERNSTEIN REALTY, INC. VS. PENINSULA OMEGA YOUTH CLUB DBA INNER CITY et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, February 6, 2014, line 5. DEFENDANT ALPHA BUIE's MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT DENIED/OVERRULED. First Amended Complaint sufficiently alleges a cause of action for Unlawful Detainer. Defendant improperly raises issue of fact not appearing on the face of the complaint. = (501/REQ)
